top_opportunities.name: Daily Green Finance Climate Risk Streak

notes: Environmental Law & Climate Governance niche — r/personalfinance (18.5M), r/science (31M), r/worldnews (31M), r/wallstreetbets (15.5M), r/history (16M), r/politics (8M), r/stocks (4.7M). All 10 niches confirmed blue ocean: zero exact-match climate/environmental law streak apps found. 0 duplicate(s) filtered: []. Strongest WTP evidence: Carbon Markets (finance professionals, $130K+ roles), ESG Regulation (accountants, lawyers, compliance officers — mandatory knowledge), Green Finance & Climate Risk (TCFD now regulatory requirement, 22.8M community). Climate is the defining policy domain of the next 50 years. Not a single app teaches Paris Agreement mechanics, Urgenda v. Netherlands, or UNCLOS systematically. Daily Stoic (4.8 stars, 42K reviews) proves the daily-lesson format works. This domain has both massive audience AND clear career ROI driving willingness to pay.
